evals.prompt: We just finished a video about the border executive order. Which platforms do we publish to and in what order?
evals.expected_output: Identify as Tier 1 content, recommend all 7 platforms, publish to X/Twitter first within 30 min, explain content cascade.
expectations: The response identifies this as Tier 1 conservative content
The response recommends all 7 platforms: YouTube Shorts, TikTok, Instagram Reels, X/Twitter, Facebook Reels, Rumble, Truth Social
The response recommends publishing to X/Twitter first (within 30 min of news breaking)
The response explains the one-video-to-seven-platform content cascade

evals.prompt: Give me the full week posting schedule across all 6 niches and 7 platforms.
evals.expected_output: Produce Mon-Sun weekly structure with platform peak times, differentiate Tier 1 vs Tier 2 cadence, include Saturday trending topic for Tier 1.
expectations: The response produces Mon-Sun structure: Mon=long-form YouTube, Wed=new short-form, Sat=Tier 1 trending
The response includes platform peak times: YouTube Wed/Thu/Sat 7-9am, TikTok Tue/Thu/Fri 6-11pm, Instagram Wed/Fri/Sat 8am/1pm/7pm
The response differentiates Tier 1 from Tier 2 niche cadence
The response includes Sunday analytics review and next-week planning

evals.prompt: Our YouTube Shorts for the AI tools niche get 50K views but the same content repurposed to Instagram Reels only gets 2K. What is wrong?
evals.expected_output: Diagnose platform-specific failures: missing trending audio, caption mismatch, first-frame thumbnail, golden hour engagement, hashtag strategy.
expectations: The response identifies missing trending audio on Instagram Reels as a primary cause
The response identifies golden hour engagement failure (not engaging in first 60 minutes)
The response addresses hashtag strategy: 5-8 mix of trending + niche + branded
The response gives specific actionable fixes for each cause
